medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Ms. ___ is a ___ yo F with known basiliar and opthalmic artery aneurysms. Presents today for elective angiogram for treatment of basiliar artery aneurysm.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Aortic Stenosis, Hypertension, Dyslipidemia, Depression, Obesity, Diabetes mellitus, Stage III Chronic kidney disease (last Cr 1.08), Cerebrovascular Disease, Hearing Loss, Osteoarthritis, Diabetic Nephropathy, GERD, Cataract, Glaucoma, Iron deficiency anemia; 6 x 7 mm basilar tip aneurysm; 3 mm left ophthalmic artery segment aneurysm. Past Surgical History: s/p Hysterectomy/Appendectomy.

physical_examination.general_examination: Upon discharge: alert and oriented to person/place/time; full strength; angio c/d/i; face symmetric; pupils equal and reactive.
